original_text:
### Callout Formatting (three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section)
1. **Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]
2. **Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]
3. **Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

relations.note: Main callout represents Style 1 of the three approved callout patterns.
Secondary callout represents Style 2 of the three approved callout patterns.
Text-heavy callout represents Style 3 of the three approved callout patterns.

quotes: Callout Formatting (three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section)

rules.intent: Maintain visual hierarchy and variety without competing focal points.
rules.rule_text: There are three approved callout styles which must be used judiciously. Never use two callouts of the same style competing on one screen or section.

quotes: Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text

1. **Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

rules.intent: Standardize styling for key-point Main callouts.
rules.rule_text: The Main callout style uses centered Bold Brand Blue text (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) with Gold horizontal rules (callout.main.rule_color = #ffc60a) above and below, characterized by a 2px rule weight (border.rule.weight = 2px), a width of 60-100% of the text block (size.rule.width = 60–100%), and 16px of padding (padding.rule.text_gap = 16px) between rule and text.

quotes: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text

2. **Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

rules.intent: Enforce unified layout and styling for data-focused callouts.
rules.rule_text: The Secondary/data callout style uses a Light Blue box (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9) at a 70% tint (opacity.callout.70 = 0.7) with Bold Brand Blue text (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b). It features 20px internal padding (padding.secondary_callout.internal = 20px) and a corner radius complying with accent-shape guidelines. It may include up to one line icon.

quotes: Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text

3. **Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.intent: Maintain design integrity and responsive standards for lists or descriptions within callouts.
rules.rule_text: The Text-heavy callout style features a Golden Sand box (color.tertiary.golden_sand = #FEF1C8) at a 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3) with 24px of internal padding (padding.section.side = 24px). Its content stack consists of a Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue subheads (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB), and Regular Graphite body text (body.color = #212121). Its two-column layout (icon+text) must collapse to a single column on mobile screens.
